title: Market Brief — Saturday, June 27, 2026
summary: GPU availability is loosening fast across every class. Util-avail stands at 38% for A100, 37% for H100, 34% for H200, and 31% for B200, all well above scarcity thresholds after utilization collapsed 17 to 27 percentage points in 30 days. The biggest daily move was H200 spot crashing 8.6% to $3.13/hr, signaling demand destruction at the high end.
paragraphs: GPU availability is loosening fast across every class. Util-avail stands at 38% for A100, 37% for H100, 34% for H200, and 31% for B200, all well above scarcity thresholds after utilization collapsed 17 to 27 percentage points in 30 days. The biggest daily move was H200 spot crashing 8.6% to $3.13/hr, signaling demand destruction at the high end.

DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.34/M output against a TCO-adjusted cost near $4.11/M on A100 is selling at a loss of roughly $3.77 per million tokens. Burning Cash. OpenAI's gpt-oss-120b at $0.15/M output is similarly underwater. B200 is the only GPU where mid-tier inference breaks even, with margins turning positive at 45% for high-volume pricing, making NVIDIA's newest silicon the only defensible cost base for open-weight hosting.

B200 compute at $4.50/hr with 69% utilization is overvalued relative to H200 spot now at $3.13/hr offering comparable inference throughput at 34% utilization. Trade is short premium B200 contracts, accumulate H200 spot while the 8.6% daily selloff extends into a structural repricing.
bullets: 38% util-avail on A100 marks the loosest supply across all GPU classes tracked by Ornn.
31% util-avail on B200 is the tightest class but still far above the 25% scarcity threshold.
$3.13/hr H200 spot median fell 8.6% day-over-day, the largest single-day GPU price move in today's data.
21.36 on the LLMflation Index means frontier token prices have fallen roughly 79% since the GPT-4 baseline of 100.
$0.34/M output tokens from DeepSeek V3.2 undercuts every Western frontier model by at least 10x.
126.9% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI makes it the most unstable GPU contract to hold.
